message:
test(backup): add integration tests and public export for remote validation

Backup Integration Tests (tests/integration/backup_tests.rs):
- Add test_backup_create_list_cycle for basic backup lifecycle
- Add test_backup_with_custom_id for named backups
- Tests verify backup creation, listing, and ID retrieval
- Uses fixture system for isolated test environments

Test Registration (tests/integration/main.rs):
- Register backup_tests module in integration test suite

Public API Export (src/sync/mod.rs):
- Re-export validate_remote_name from config module
- Allows external crates and CLI commands to use the validation
  function without reaching into sync::config directly
- Completes the public API for remote name validation added in
  commit 57d4f10

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
